series_metadata.series_description: Ad hoc reports generated by MIS from the MMIS, Medicaid Management Information System, including MMIS sub-systems Control D and MARS, Monthly Administrative Reporting System to monitor payments to providers for services provided to Medicaid recipients to ensure services and claims are being paid/denied in accordance with Ohio Medicaid program requirements. Data includes medical health care eligibility, health care insurance, prior authorization, surveillance and utilization audit findings, case and claims/remittance information and buy-in summaries/totals of premiums paid by providers and recipients for health care services. Information is used to monitor operational performance and cross-match state and county welfare records to minimize duplicate payments.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: systems generated microfiche , and ; Electronic: and ; Paper: Printed reports in office 1 year
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
